allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d['timelines'][0]; print\(json.dumps\(t, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const e = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('timelines/embeddings.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Topics:', Object.keys\(e\).length\); console.log\('Dims:', e[Object.keys\(e\)[0]].length\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('timelines/timeline.json','utf8'\)\); let n=0; d.timelines.forEach\(t => { if \(t.parentId === undefined\) { t.parentId = null; n++; } }\); fs.writeFileSync\('timelines/timeline.json', JSON.stringify\(d, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Added parentId to', n, 'topics'\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('timelines/timeline.json','utf8'\)\); const parents=d.timelines.filter\(t => d.timelines.some\(c => c.parentId === t.id\)\); console.log\('Parents:', parents.map\(p => p.title\)\); const leaves=d.timelines.filter\(t => !d.timelines.some\(c => c.parentId === t.id\)\); console.log\('Leaves count:', leaves.length\); const orphans=leaves.filter\(t => !t.parentId\); console.log\('Orphan leaves:', orphans.map\(o => o.title\)\);")
